instruction: Restore the green status dot on the document check icon in the bottom-left (cx=24, cy=104, r=5, fill #22c55e).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/document-check.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.125 2.25h-4.5c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-9M10.125 2.25h.375a9 9 0 0 1 9 9v.375M10.125 2.25A3.375 3.375 0 0 1 13.5 5.625v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 1 3.375 3.375M9 15l2.25 2.25L15 12"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/document-check.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.125 2.25h-4.5c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-9M10.125 2.25h.375a9 9 0 0 1 9 9v.375M10.125 2.25A3.375 3.375 0 0 1 13.5 5.625v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 1 3.375 3.375M9 15l2.25 2.25L15 12"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#22c55e" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
